author: 4source
description: Adds a view which shows the opened windows, groups, tabs and editors inside them. Makes managing the open editors easier.

manifest.description: Adds a view which shows the opened windows, groups, tabs and editors inside them. Makes managing the open editors easier.
manifest.name: Open Editors

name: Open Editors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update plugin template by @4Source in https://github.com/4Source/open-editors-obsidian-plugin/pull/24
* Make styles.css optional by @4Source in https://github.com/4Source/open-editors-obsidian-plugin/pull/25
* Fix missing package-lock update of version-change.mjs by @4Source in https://github.com/4Source/open-editors-obsidian-plugin/pull/26
* Improve linting / Fix typos / Security Audit by @4Source in https://github.com/4Source/open-editors-obsidian-plugin/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/4Source/open-editors-obsidian-plugin/compare/0.2.0...0.2.1
